title: importFromSeedHex: partial in-memory update if prefs.setString throws
description: In identity_service.dart importFromSeedHex, if _initFromSeed() succeeds (updating _keyPair and _pubId in memory) but the subsequent prefs.setString() throws, the app holds a new identity in memory but the old identity is still persisted to SharedPreferences. On restart, the app re-loads the old identity, silently reverting. This is a torn state that the user cannot detect or recover from without re-doing the restore. Fix: save to prefs first, then call _initFromSeed(), or wrap both in a rollback pattern.
close_reason: reordered importFromSeedHex: prefs.setString before _initFromSeed so failure leaves memory and storage consistent
